zh.lifeSummary: 當Elinor Douglas於1375年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，她的父親Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas17歲，母親Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland27歲。她和Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1425年在蘇格蘭享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elinor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Elinor Douglas was born in 1375, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas, was 17 and her mother, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth. She died in 1425, in Scotland, at the age of 50.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elinor Douglasが1375年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた時，父Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglasは17歳，母Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotlandは27歳であった。彼女はSir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1425年にスコットランドで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elinor Douglas(이)가 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 스컷랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elinor Douglas родилась в 1375 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir James Douglas 2nd Earl of Douglas было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Sir William Fraser 2nd Lord of Philorth. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет.
